rationale_source: F1.TT missing per Layer 3 #15 recommended-default (b) flag-as-missing + escalate to broker

transaction_type.rationale: Broker silent; loan_app TT empty; no mortgage_statement for inference. F1.TT has no signal. Per Layer 3 #15 (b): flag-as-missing + ask broker (TT is load-bearing for LTV math; defaulting silently risks wrong workflow).

must_include.rationale: Vienna asks broker to confirm TT per Layer 3 #15 (b).

outbound_emails.rationale: Cannot fire prelim without TT (LTV math depends on it).
